description: This file provides adapter functions for a frontend application to communicate with backend services or mock data. It exports functions to create mock and REST-based adapters, which implement methods for listing, creating, updating, and acknowledging alerts, sites, anomalies, reports, and related operations. The code facilitates switching between mock and real backend implementations and encapsulates API interaction logic.

methods.name: createMockAdapter()
methods.description: Creates a mock adapter that returns sample data for frontend testing purposes. All methods simulate asynchronous operations.

methods.name: createRestAdapter(options = {})
methods.description: Creates a REST API adapter that interfaces with backend endpoints, based on provided options.

methods.name: createBackendAdapter()
methods.description: Factory function that returns either a mock or REST adapter depending on backend configuration.
